description: A listing description is the written portion of a real estate ad that highlights a home’s key features and selling points. It appears alongside photos on sites like Zillow and Realtor.com, and it’s often a buyer’s first impression of the property — only second to photos. A well-written description can grab attention, spark interest, help the home sell faster, and even help it sell for more money. Writing a good home listing description means more than just listing facts. It's about creating a story that helps buyers imagine themselves living there. That means using strong visuals, specific details, and a friendly, engaging tone. In this guide, we'll walk you through how to format a great property description, offer tips to help you write your own, and share both strong and weak examples to help you get a better idea.
